title: lysias orbiculata
intro: Lysias orbiculata, also known as the 'Chinese Angelica', is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae, native to China and Taiwan. Traditionally, it has been used in medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and aiding in digestion. In herbal preparations, Lysias orbiculata is often used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
